data.title: Register check-contract-schemas and check-referential-integrity as pre-commit hooks and in validate.sh
data.description:
## What
Register both new check scripts as pre-commit hooks in .pre-commit-config.yaml and validate.sh. Also update examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml to avoid hook-drift check failure.

## Context
After T1 (adf7-8c44) and T2 (1f46-f625) implement the scripts, this task integrates them into the enforcement infrastructure. Both checks must run as pre-commit hooks (Done Definition 3).

## Files to Modify
- MODIFY: .pre-commit-config.yaml — add two new hook entries
- MODIFY: examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml — mirror the same two entries (required by hook-drift check at validate.sh:1000)
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh — add both checks to syntax-check tier

## Implementation Details

### .pre-commit-config.yaml and examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml
Add after the existing shim-refs-check hook:

```yaml
      - id: contract-schema-check
        name: Contract Schema Check (5s timeout)
        entry: ./plugins/dso/scripts/pre-commit-wrapper.sh contract-schema-check 5 "plugins/dso/scripts/check-contract-schemas.sh"
        language: system
        pass_filenames: false
        stages: [pre-commit]
        files: ^plugins/dso/docs/contracts/

      - id: referential-integrity-check
        name: Referential Integrity Check (10s timeout)
        entry: ./plugins/dso/scripts/pre-commit-wrapper.sh referential-integrity-check 10 "plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh"
        language: system
        pass_filenames: false
        stages: [pre-commit]
        files: ^plugins/dso/(skills|agents)/
```

### validate.sh (3 places, following existing pattern for check-shim-refs.sh)
1. LAUNCHED_CHECKS line (~line 839): add `contract-schema` and `referential-integrity` to the list
2. run_check dispatch block (~line 860): add:
   `(cd "$REPO_ROOT" && run_check "contract-schema" "$TIMEOUT_SYNTAX" bash "$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/check-contract-schemas.sh") &`
   `(cd "$REPO_ROOT" && run_check "referential-integrity" "$TIMEOUT_SYNTAX" bash "$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/check-referential-integrity.sh") &`
3. report_check block (~line 998): add entries for both
4. tally_check block (~line 1009): add entries for both

## Acceptance Criteria
- Given .pre-commit-config.yaml is updated, When I run `grep 'contract-schema-check\|referential-integrity-check' .pre-commit-config.yaml`, Then both hooks appear
- Given examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml is updated, When I diff the hook IDs between .pre-commit-config.yaml and examples/, Then no hook-drift failures occur
- Given validate.sh is updated, When I run `bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci`, Then contract-schema and referential-integrity checks appear in the results
- Given an intentionally broken contract file, When I run `git add` and attempt a commit, Then the contract-schema-check pre-commit hook blocks the commit

## Testing Mode: UPDATE
